text:
Once upon a time in a quaint little town, there lived a brave young squirrel named Oliver. Oliver loved nothing more than exploring the woods nearby. One bright morning, he decided to explore an old oak tree at the edge of the forest.

As he climbed higher branches, Oliver realized he'd discovered an old book nestled securely between two bark layers.

That evening, curious about the mysterious book,Oliver curled up inside its cozy nest.

Hours turned into night, and the book illuminated Oliver's world.

It told of an enchanted forest creature named Oakwing. Oakwing had dreams far bigger than pine needles.

Each night under the wise owl's watchmantowl, Oakwing dreamt of flying over snowy mountains, fluttering into caves filled with sparkling jewels.

But every morning Oakwing awakened painfully aware of a cruel forest owl owl whom Oakwing dearly loved.

One dream-october night, Oakwing dreamt dreams so beautiful they seemed real.
